item.text: I’ll execute turn 010 with the deck converting a treasure hand into another economy buy. On board, the clean line is to kill the damaged P1 marksman, step onto `center-center`, advance the raider, and recruit again if supply permits.

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc 'set -euo pipefail
RUN=.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided
DECK_ACTION=$RUN/actions/turn-010.deck.json
BOARD_ACTION=$RUN/actions/turn-010.board.json
DECK_RESULT=$RUN/results/turn-010.deck.result.json
BOARD_RESULT=$RUN/results/turn-010.board.result.json
WIN_EVENTS=$RUN/actions/turn-010.win-events.json
TERMINAL_WIN_EVENTS=$RUN/actions/turn-010.terminal-win-events.json

cat > "$DECK_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-010\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"buyCard\",\"cardId\":\"gold\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON

if "'! bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state "$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$DECK_ACTION" --result "$DECK_RESULT"; then
  cat > "$DECK_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-010\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"buyCard\",\"cardId\":\"peddler\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
  if "'! bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state "$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$DECK_ACTION" --result "$DECK_RESULT"; then
    cat > "$DECK_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-010\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"buyCard\",\"cardId\":\"village\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
    if "'! bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state "$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$DECK_ACTION" --result "$DECK_RESULT"; then
      cat > "$DECK_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-010\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
      bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state \""'$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$DECK_ACTION" --result "$DECK_RESULT"
    fi
  fi
fi

cat > "$BOARD_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-010\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P2-marksman-start-4\",\"from\":{\"col\":5,\"row\":6},\"to\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-turn-008-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":0,\"row\":8},\"to\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":6}}],\"recruits\":[{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-turn-010-1\",\"type\":\"raider\",\"at\":{\"col\":1,\"row\":8}}],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P2-marksman-start-4\",\"target\":\"P1-marksman-start-4\",\"deckDamage\":0},{\"attacker\":\"P2-scout-start-2\",\"target\":\"P1-marksman-start-4\",\"deckDamage\":0}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON

if "'! bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state "$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --actions "$BOARD_ACTION" --result "$BOARD_RESULT"; then
  cat > "$BOARD_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-010\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P2-marksman-start-4\",\"from\":{\"col\":5,\"row\":6},\"to\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-turn-008-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":0,\"row\":8},\"to\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":6}}],\"recruits\":[],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P2-marksman-start-4\",\"target\":\"P1-marksman-start-4\",\"deckDamage\":0},{\"attacker\":\"P2-scout-start-2\",\"target\":\"P1-marksman-start-4\",\"deckDamage\":0}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
  if "'! bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state "$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --actions "$BOARD_ACTION" --result "$BOARD_RESULT"; then
    cat > "$BOARD_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-010\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P2-marksman-start-4\",\"from\":{\"col\":5,\"row\":6},\"to\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":6}},{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-turn-008-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":0,\"row\":8},\"to\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":6}}],\"recruits\":[],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P2-marksman-start-4\",\"target\":\"P1-marksman-start-4\",\"deckDamage\":0},{\"attacker\":\"P2-scout-start-2\",\"target\":\"P1-marksman-start-4\",\"deckDamage\":0}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
    bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state \""'$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --actions "$BOARD_ACTION" --result "$BOARD_RESULT"
  fi
fi

SUMMARY="P2 converted a treasure hand into Gold, killed the damaged P1 marksman, stepped onto center-center, advanced a raider, and recruited another raider."
REASONING="With no actions in hand, moving straight to buy and taking Gold is best for the engine. On board, the marksman can claim center-center while combining with the scout to remove P1'"'s damaged marksman; the raider advances toward the fight and a fresh recruit expands P2's board presence if legal.\"

COMMIT_LOG="'$(mktemp)
if ! bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --board-result "$BOARD_RESULT" --summary "$SUMMARY" --reasoning "$REASONING" --strict-win >"$COMMIT_LOG" 2>&1; then
  cat "$COMMIT_LOG"
  if grep -q "winEvents'"\\|terminalWinEvents\" \""'$COMMIT_LOG"; then
    python3 - "$COMMIT_LOG" "$WIN_EVENTS" "$TERMINAL_WIN_EVENTS" <<'"'PY'
import json, sys
log=open(sys.argv[1]).read()
def extract(label):
    i=log.find(label)
    if i<0: return None
    j=log.find('[', i)
    if j<0: return None
    depth=0
    for k in range(j, len(log)):
        if log[k]=='[': depth+=1
        elif log[k]==']':
            depth-=1
            if depth==0:
                return json.loads(log[j:k+1])
for label,path in [('winEvents',sys.argv[2]),('terminalWinEvents',sys.argv[3])]:
    arr=extract(label)
    if arr is not None:
        open(path,'w').write(json.dumps(arr,separators=(',',':'))+'\\n')
PY
    EXTRA=()
    [ -s \""'$WIN_EVENTS" ] && EXTRA+=(--win-events "$WIN_EVENTS")
    [ -s "$TERMINAL_WIN_EVENTS" ] && EXTRA+=(--terminal-win-events "$TERMINAL_WIN_EVENTS")
    bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --board-result "$BOARD_RESULT" --summary "$SUMMARY" --reasoning "$REASONING" --strict-win "${EXTRA[@]}"
  else
    exit 1
  fi
else
  cat "$COMMIT_LOG"
fi
rm -f "$COMMIT_LOG"

bun run --silent validate-run -- --strict --strict-deck --strict-win "$RUN/timeline.json"

node - <<'"'NODE'
const fs=require('fs');
const da=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided/actions/turn-010.deck.json','utf8'));
const ba=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided/actions/turn-010.board.json','utf8'));
console.log('DECK_LINE', JSON.stringify(da.actions));
console.log('BOARD_LINE', JSON.stringify(ba.actions));
console.log('RATIONALE No action cards means immediate buy phase; Gold is the best engine/economy buy. Marksman takes center-center and combines with scout to kill the damaged P1 marksman, while the raider advance and recruit convert supply into board pressure.');
NODE"

item.text:
Committed and validated `turn-010`.

Deck line: move to buy, buy Gold, end turn.

Board line: marksman moved to `(6,5)` and attacked `P1-marksman-start-4`; scout also attacked `P1-marksman-start-4`; raider advanced from `(0,8)` to `(4,6)`; recruited `P2-raider-turn-010-1` at `(1,8)`.

Rationale: with no action cards, Gold is the best engine buy. The board line removes P1’s damaged marksman, takes `center-center`, and converts supply into more melee pressure.
